local_validation.notes: The compiler body itself is high-level BML source in form/form-stdlib/bml/bmf-bml-compiler-picture.bml. Form s-expressions are limited to parser/proof infrastructure in this slice. The BML source proof returns 42 across Go/Rust/TypeScript and checks parsed templates, generic fields, compiler-compiler flow, language ports, syntax block, and reversible control primitives. The documented release direction keeps Form as minimum bootstrap/witness substrate and moves non-bootstrap compiler behavior into BML before retiring s-expression compiler code.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The modern BMF/BML compiler and compiler-compiler picture now has a high-level BML source body using classes, interfaces, templates, generics, sections, constants, syntax, and reversible control. The Form proof parses and verifies the BML source shape while the docs name Form/s-expression code as minimum bootstrap/witness scaffolding to retire after self-hosting.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-compiler-source-picture-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This lands the BML source body and parser proof. Full semantic lowering from this BML source into canonical compiler objects, runtime registry capsules, target-language emitters, and eventual retirement of non-bootstrap s-expression compiler code remain next refinements.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/bml/bmf-bml-compiler-picture.bml carries the compiler/compiler-compiler source in high-level BML class/template code.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk now recognizes generic type strings, template declarations, interface shells, and class-level syntax blocks for source proof.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-compiler-source-picture-proof.fk parses the BML source and proves 42 structural checks across sibling kernels.

kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md names the bootstrap boundary: BML owns compiler behavior; Form/s-expression code remains only as minimum bootstrap and proof carrier until self-hosting removes the rest.
